name: stripe.invoice.paid
description: v0.7 PR 4 demo handler — receives the verified Stripe `invoice.paid` event from v07-stripe-webhook via polymorphic sub-workflow dispatch (`namespace: 'stripe'` + `subworkflow: 'js/ctx.request.body.type'` resolved to `'invoice.paid'` → `'stripe.invoice.paid'`). The parent passed the event through `inputs.stripeEvent`, which becomes this child's `ctx.request.body.stripeEvent`. Real handlers would record the payment, send a receipt email, etc.
